data.content: Plan complete for interactive model picker with incremental TTY input. Key design: raw terminal mode (stty raw -echo) with character-by-character read loop from /dev/tty. Arrow keys parsed via ESC sequence detection with 100ms timeout. Backspace removes last query char and refilters (empty query restores full list). Pre-computed lowercase array for 175+ model filtering avoids per-keystroke subprocesses. Multi-select via Enter toggle, Tab/Esc to submit. Threshold dispatch: >15 models triggers interactive picker, <=15 keeps existing numbered menu (no regression). "Other (type manually)" preserved as virtual entry with temporary raw mode exit. Changes to both setup.sh and agent-wizard.sh. Two new test scripts: unit tests for filter logic, PTY-based integration tests using script command with explicit byte sequences for arrow keys, backspace, and selection.
